overlay.maidmarriage.proposal_ring.tip: Hold one ring in each hand, then propose when maid favorability reaches Level 1.
overlay.maidmarriage.sunflower_hairpin.t: Maid bauble: while equipped, child growth is paused.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.need_owner: %s: You can only marry your own maid.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.born_maid_: The marriage rule for born maid descendants has been updated.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.need_favor: %s: Not enough favorability. Requires at least %s.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.already_ma: %s: Silly Master, we are already married.
%s: This maid is already married to someone else.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.success: %s: A happy union. She accepted the YES Pillow.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.pillow_mai: %s's backpack is full. The YES Pillow dropped beside her.
message.maidmarriage.breed.need_owner: You can only use this on your own maid.
message.maidmarriage.breed.not_married: This maid is not married to you yet.
message.maidmarriage.breed.need_sleeping: Dummy, you want to do that right here...?
message.maidmarriage.breed.cannot_find_m: Cannot locate the maid bed currently used by her.
message.maidmarriage.breed.need_adjacent: You need a vanilla bed adjacent to the maid bed.
message.maidmarriage.breed.sleep_failed: Failed to enter sleep. Please check time and bed placement.
message.maidmarriage.breed.pregnant_bloc: %s: She is currently pregnant and cannot start this.
message.maidmarriage.breed.postpartum_bl: %s: She is still in postpartum recovery and cannot start this.
message.maidmarriage.breed.pregnant_succ: %s: She is now carrying your child.
message.maidmarriage.breed.birth_success: %s: Birth successful. The child is born.
message.maidmarriage.breed.mother_missin: %s: The maid is not nearby. Process aborted.
message.maidmarriage.breed.use_name_tag: Name tag used. Child name set to: %s
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.1: The night is quiet, and you gently hold her hand.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.2: She leans closer in her sleep, her breath soft and warm.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.3: You kiss her, and only your heartbeats remain in the room.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.4: Morning light falls, and that faint crimson bloom on the sheet quietly seals your new promise.
advancements.maidmarriage.root.title: Journey of Vows
advancements.maidmarriage.root.descripti: Vows and family with your maid
advancements.maidmarriage.marriage.title: A Ring-Finger Promise
advancements.maidmarriage.marriage.descr: A marriage vow sealed by your pinky promise
Under moonlight, you spend your first night together.
advancements.maidmarriage.childbirth.des: A new travel partner has joined you!
advancements.maidmarriage.romance_ten.de: You have shared ten nights together; your maid has become a little cream puff.
overlay.maidmarriage.yes_pillow.tip: After marriage, right-click your sleeping maid to trigger the shared-sleep scene~
message.maidmarriage.breed.not_time_yet: Now is not the time for that!
message.maidmarriage.child.work.need_sle: %s should rest now. Let her continue %s during the daytime work schedule.
message.maidmarriage.child.work.need_wor: %s is resting now. Let her continue %s during the daytime work schedule.
message.maidmarriage.child.work.need_bac: %s does not have a usable backpack yet. Prepare one before assigning %s.
message.maidmarriage.child.work.sleeping: %s is already asleep. Let her continue %s after she wakes up.
message.maidmarriage.child.work.sitting: %s is sitting and resting. Let her stand up before assigning %s.
message.maidmarriage.child.work.tired: %s rubs her eyes. She looks tired, so slow today's study down a little.
message.maidmarriage.child.work.exhauste: %s is worn out. Let her rest; this result will be weaker, and her mood and favor will suffer.
message.maidmarriage.breed.exhausted_tod: %s: Already exhausted today. Let's do it tomorrow.
dialogue.maidmarriage.proposal.1: %2$s, ever since I met you, every day of %1$s feels different.
dialogue.maidmarriage.proposal.2: %1$s does not only want to be your maid, but also your partner.
dialogue.maidmarriage.proposal.3: So please let %1$s stay with you as your wife, okay %2$s?
dialogue.maidmarriage.daytime: %2$s, thinking about that this early, honestly.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.own_child_: %s: You cannot propose to a little maid or your own child.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.harem_disa: Harem mode is disabled. You can only marry one maid.
message.maidmarriage.confession.not_read: She is not ready to answer that confession yet.
message.maidmarriage.child.growth.middle: %s has grown into the child stage.
overlay.maidmarriage.longing_tester.tip: Right-click your own maid to force her into Patient mood for testing.
message.maidmarriage.debug.longing_appli: Debug: This maid has been set to Patient mood.
dialogue.maidmarriage.longing.dating.2: %2$s, can you stay with %1$s a little longer today?
dialogue.maidmarriage.longing.dating.3: %1$s thought she might not see you again today.
dialogue.maidmarriage.longing.dating.5: %1$s missed you a little... only a little.
dialogue.maidmarriage.longing.marriage.4: Please don't leave too quickly today, okay?
dialogue.maidmarriage.longing.low_mood.3: Please don't brush this off with a joke, okay?
dialogue.maidmarriage.after_romance: %2$s, honestly... %1$s cannot focus on work today.
tooltip.maidmarriage.proposal_ring: Propose to the maid you love.
tooltip.maidmarriage.sunflower_hairpin: Maid bauble: pauses little maid growth while equipped.
tooltip.maidmarriage.yes_pillow: A mysterious maid treasure obtained after marriage, used to make some curious requests...
message.maidmarriage.proposal.need_mainh: Please hold a proposal ring in your main hand first.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.need_offha: Please hold another proposal ring in your off-hand first.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.ring_used: This ring has already been engraved with a vow and cannot be used to propose to other maids.
item.maidmarriage.vow_ring.desc: It forges a lifelong promise into warmth at your fingertip, and seals two hearts into an eternal star.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.gentle.1: Moonlight falls by the bedside as she rests her forehead softly on your shoulder.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.gentle.2: Your fingers interlace, and even your breathing settles into the same rhythm.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.gentle.3: She whispers your name, her voice as gentle as the midnight breeze.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.gentle.4: At dawn, she is still in your arms, wearing a calm and content smile.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.passion.1: As the night deepens, both your heartbeats start to race.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.passion.2: She holds you tight, as if she wants to pour out every bit of longing from tonight.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.passion.3: With your breaths entwined, the room is filled with a warm and unwavering closeness.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.passion.4: When first light arrives, she leans on you with flushed cheeks and happy eyes.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.sweet.1: She shares half the blanket with you and quietly slips her hand into yours.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.sweet.2: You answer her soft murmur and pull her a little closer with a smile.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.sweet.3: Night wind brushes past the window as you both drift off in each other's warmth.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.sweet.4: When morning light pours in, she wakes first and gives you a tender good-morning kiss.
overlay.maidmarriage.child.learn.enchant: Switch child maid to Work Mode [Enchantment Study], then keep a Book in her main hand.
overlay.maidmarriage.child.learn.alchemy: Switch child maid to Work Mode [Alchemy Study], then keep a Glass Bottle/Potion in her main hand (unstackable materials can also be consumed from backpack).
overlay.maidmarriage.child.learn.tactics: Switch child maid to Work Mode [Tactics Study], then keep a weapon in her main hand (unstackable weapons can also be consumed from backpack).
overlay.maidmarriage.child.explore: Switch child maid to Work Mode [Exploration], then keep a Stick in her main hand or backpack.
overlay.maidmarriage.child.favor.recover: Feed Sugar/Milk/Golden Apple to restore favorability. Staying idle for a day grants +5.
message.maidmarriage.child.learn.finish: %s finished studying: %s, and brought back rewards.
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.learn.exhaus: %2$s, I'm tired... can I rest for a little while?
%2$s, my head feels all fuzzy... let me hug the book and zone out a bit.
%2$s, I'll keep trying, but I'm really sleepy now...
%2$s, I studied too much today. %1$s wants a break.
%2$s, I'm tired... can we continue tomorrow?
message.maidmarriage.child.explore.need_: Little maid is exhausted and should not explore right now.
Little maid is below 30% health and cannot explore now.
message.maidmarriage.child.explore.injur: %s got injured during exploration. Please heal her first.
message.maidmarriage.child.action.busy: Little maid is busy with another action. Please wait.
message.maidmarriage.child.favor.blocked: %s favorability is too low (current: %s). It must recover to 15+ before actions.
guide.maidmarriage.title: Heart Pact Player Guide
message.maidmarriage.child.favor.rested: %s rested for a full day. Favorability +5, now: %s
task.maidmarriage.child_study_enchantmen: Task: consumes a Book from main hand or backpack to run enchantment study and return enchantment-related rewards. If she is exhausted, reward quality drops sharply and favor may fall.
task.maidmarriage.child_study_alchemy.de: Task: consumes a Glass Bottle or Potion from main hand or backpack to run alchemy study. If she is exhausted, reward quality drops sharply and favor may fall.
task.maidmarriage.child_study_tactics.de: Task: consumes a weapon from main hand or backpack to run tactics study. If she is exhausted, reward quality drops sharply and favor may fall.
task.maidmarriage.child_explore.desc:
Task: consumes one stick and sends her exploring. Higher favor lowers empty/injury odds, improves reward count, and raises rare discovery chance. Rest or sleep time pauses the task until work time resumes.
§eRequirement: main hand or backpack has a Stick.
dialogue.maidmarriage.flower.red: A red flower from %2$s. %1$s loves it.
dialogue.maidmarriage.flower.yellow: So bright like sunlight. Thank you, %2$s.
dialogue.maidmarriage.flower.blue: These blue flowers are calm. %1$s will treasure them.
dialogue.maidmarriage.flower.white: White flowers from %2$s feel so gentle.
dialogue.maidmarriage.flower.orange: Orange feels full of energy. %1$s is motivated now.
dialogue.maidmarriage.flower.pink: Pink is adorable. %2$s made %1$s blush again.
dialogue.maidmarriage.flower.purple: Purple is elegant. %1$s really likes it.
dialogue.maidmarriage.flower.black: Even black flowers... %2$s is truly thoughtful.
advancements.maidmarriage.flower_red.des: Give your maid a red bouquet for the first time.
Give your maid a yellow bouquet for the first time.
advancements.maidmarriage.flower_blue.de: Give your maid a blue bouquet for the first time.

Give your maid an orange bouquet for the first time.
advancements.maidmarriage.flower_pink.de: Give your maid a pink bouquet for the first time.
Give your maid a purple bouquet for the first time.
advancements.maidmarriage.flower_black.d: Give your maid a black bouquet for the first time.

tooltip.maidmarriage.rainbow_bouquet: A bouquet woven from five flowers. Give it to your maid for extra favorability.
message.maidmarriage.flower.already_gift: %s: You already gave this color (%s). It no longer increases favorability.
dialogue.maidmarriage.flower.rainbow: A rainbow bouquet. %2$s is so romantic today.

advancements.maidmarriage.flower_rainbow: Give your maid a rainbow bouquet for the first time.
message.maidmarriage.debug.longing_disab: Clingy maid setting is disabled; patience test is unavailable.
dialogue.maidmarriage.after_birth: %2$s, our child is safely born. %1$s will take good care of her.

message.maidmarriage.child.requirement.w: Main hand holds: Weapon (unstackable weapons can use backpack)
message.maidmarriage.child.requirement.e: Main hand or backpack has: Stick
dialogue.maidmarriage.pregnant: %2$s... %1$s thinks she is pregnant. We are going to have a child.
config.maidmarriage.key_settings.hint: Key bindings follow Minecraft's Controls screen. Change them under Options -> Controls -> Heart Pact.
config.maidmarriage.debug.hint: When enabled, F7 maid debug, F8 lift/carry-child pose debug, and action height/distance previews become available.
config.maidmarriage.debug.status: Current: debug tools %s; birth/growth countdown %s; UI action tips %s.
config.maidmarriage.postpartum_server_on: Postpartum recovery is enabled by default and cannot be disabled by clients; multiplayer servers control it through the server common config.
config.maidmarriage.server_authority.hin: On multiplayer servers, harem mode follows each player's synced local setting. Birth/growth days and postpartum recovery are controlled by the server common config.
message.maidmarriage.breed.birth_not_due: %s: Birth is not due yet, about %s day(s) left.
tooltip.maidmarriage.sauce_duck: Feed to a child maid: growth time -1 day; feed postpartum maid: recovery time -10%.

message.maidmarriage.postpartum.reduce: %s: Fed 1 Sauce Duck. Postpartum recovery remaining time reduced by %s.

dialogue.maidmarriage.rhythm.start.1: %2$s, follow the beat~ %1$s will match you. (?>?<?)
dialogue.maidmarriage.rhythm.start.2: Ready, %2$s? No rush, take it easy~ (^_^)/
dialogue.maidmarriage.rhythm.perfect.2: That's it! Great rhythm, keep going~
dialogue.maidmarriage.rhythm.perfect.3: Perfect hit! %2$s is on fire today~
dialogue.maidmarriage.rhythm.miss.1: Oops, a little late... stay calm~
dialogue.maidmarriage.rhythm.fail.2: Too many misses in a row... %1$s can't keep up...
dialogue.maidmarriage.rhythm.player_peak: %2$s, that rhythm is intense... %1$s is blushing~
Ah... that hit was strong, %1$s can feel it~
dialogue.maidmarriage.rhythm.maid_peak.1: Mm... this beat feels really good~
dialogue.maidmarriage.revive.child1: Um... I don't know why I became like this...
dialogue.maidmarriage.revive.child2: But being reunited with you, Master, is really wonderful.
message.maidmarriage.command.divorce.suc: Marriage and pregnancy have been cleared for %s.
tooltip.maidmarriage.marriage_consent_fo: Stamp an adult born maid first, then stamp a target player to transfer guardianship.
overlay.maidmarriage.marriage_consent_fo: Step 1: right-click an adult born maid. Step 2: right-click a target player. Favorability resets to 0 after transfer.
message.maidmarriage.consent.need_owner: Only the current owner can use a Marriage Consent Form for %s.
message.maidmarriage.consent.need_child: %s is not a born maid descendant and cannot use this form.
message.maidmarriage.consent.need_adult: %s is still underage. Wait until adulthood for consent transfer.
message.maidmarriage.consent.maid_select: %s selected. Use the form on a target player to complete transfer.
message.maidmarriage.consent.select_maid: Use the form on an adult born maid first.
message.maidmarriage.consent.maid_missin: Selected maid not found. Please select again.
message.maidmarriage.consent.not_owner_a: You are no longer the owner of %s, transfer canceled.
message.maidmarriage.consent.target_self: Marriage Consent Form cannot target yourself.
message.maidmarriage.consent.target_bloc: %s is a direct blood relative within two generations and cannot marry this maid.
message.maidmarriage.consent.transfer_su: Transfer complete: %s is now managed by %s. Favorability reset to 0.
You are now the guardian of %s. Favorability was reset to 0.
message.maidmarriage.consent.invalid_tar: Marriage Consent Form can only target maids or players.
Dad... even if I am not by your side anymore, please remember to eat on time.
You always put yourself last. I will worry about you... please take care of yourself first.
Thank you for all your care and companionship. I will treasure these memories forever.
May your days be safe, warm, and happy... I will always wish you the best.
message.maidmarriage.pet_head.need_sitti: %s is not sitting now. Let her sit first.
message.maidmarriage.pet_head.adult_need: %s is not sitting now. Let her sit first before head pats.
dialogue.maidmarriage.pet_head.1: Mm... your head pats make me feel so safe~
message.maidmarriage.pet_head.success: You gently pat %s on the head. Favorability +%s.
dialogue.maidmarriage.pet_head.3: Your gentle touch makes my heart feel warm.
message.maidmarriage.pet_head.no_target: No sitting maid is available for head pats right now.
dialogue.maidmarriage.pet_head.4: The warmth of your hand... feels so tender.
dialogue.maidmarriage.pet_head.limit_war: ...Alright, that's enough for today. I am not going to get any more obedient just because you keep patting.
Are you pushing it a little today...? Keep going and I might ignore you for a while.
message.maidmarriage.pet_head.need_owner: You can only head-pat your own maid: %s
dialogue.maidmarriage.pet_head.2: Hehe, one more please... %1$s likes this a lot~
message.maidmarriage.lift.need_standing: %s is currently sitting. Let her stand first.
message.maidmarriage.lift.no_target: No little maid nearby can be lifted right now.
message.maidmarriage.lift.up_success: You gently lift %s onto your head.
dialogue.maidmarriage.lift.down: Okay okay, %1$s will stand nicely now. Do not worry, %2$s~
message.maidmarriage.lift.need_owner: You can only lift your own little maid: %s
message.maidmarriage.lift.already_lifted: %s is already being lifted by another player.
message.maidmarriage.lift.need_child: %s is not a little maid and cannot be lifted.
message.maidmarriage.lift.mount_failed: Failed to lift %s. Please try again later.
dialogue.maidmarriage.lift.fly.1: %2$s, wow... we're flying! The wind feels so soft brushing past my face~
dialogue.maidmarriage.lift.fly.2: %2$s, seeing the ground from up here feels like being held by the clouds.
dialogue.maidmarriage.lift.fly.3: %2$s, don't put me down yet... I want to watch the sky a little longer.
dialogue.maidmarriage.lift.fly.4: %2$s, flying together makes my mood feel so bright.
dialogue.maidmarriage.lift.fly.5: %2$s, when you carry me through the air, even the wind feels gentle.
dialogue.maidmarriage.hug.start: Mm... being held like this by you makes my heart calm down right away.
dialogue.maidmarriage.hug.stop: Hehe, I will stand nicely first. Come hug me again anytime.

message.maidmarriage.hug.need_child: %s is not a little maid anymore. Please use the adult maid interaction.
message.maidmarriage.hug.need_standing: %s is sitting now. Let her stand first.

message.maidmarriage.hug.start_success: You gently pull %s into your arms.

message.maidmarriage.kiss.need_interacti: %s is not currently in an intimate interaction with you.
message.maidmarriage.kiss.need_owner: You can only kiss your own maid: %s
message.maidmarriage.kiss.no_target: There is no current interaction target available to kiss.
message.maidmarriage.kiss.bloodline_bloc: %s is your direct bloodline descendant, so this kiss is not allowed.
dialogue.maidmarriage.kiss.bloodline_blo: %2$s, I've already grown up... this kind of thing isn't okay, right...?
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.title: Interacting
ui.maidmarriage.child_interaction.title: Little Maid Interaction
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.hug_desc: Stay in the embrace and let the moment breathe.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.kiss_desc: Lean in gently and make the distance smaller.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.pet_desc: Give her a soft head pat and some reassurance.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.hug_line:
Narration: A gentle warmth settles into your palms, and the closeness between you becomes a little softer.
Narration: The brief silence does not feel awkward at all; it only makes each breath easier to notice.
Let's stay like this a little longer... I do not need anything else right now. Being able to lean on you already feels safe enough.
If time could slow down just a little, I think I would want to remember this moment for much longer.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.kiss_line:
Narration: The distance closes in quietly, and even the air seems to pause for a beat.
Narration: Her eyelashes tremble slightly, and warmth begins to spread to the tips of her ears.
If we get any closer than this... I-I cannot promise I will be able to keep looking at you so calmly.
But... if it is you, maybe letting myself be a little selfish would not be so bad.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.pet_line:
Narration: Your fingertips pass gently through her hair, and the softness of the motion slowly reaches her.
Narration: The tension that lingered before begins to loosen bit by bit under the quiet reassurance.
Mm... just like that. You can be even gentler if you want. I really like the way you are patting my head right now.
When you comfort me this seriously, it always makes me want to move a little closer to you.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.idle_line_1: {player}'s shoulders... they are even broader than I imagined. Leaning on them feels very safe.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.idle_line_2: When {player} holds me like this, even my breathing starts to calm down... I really like this spot.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.idle_line_3: The warmth around {player} always makes me want to move a little closer... this feels just right.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.idle_line_4: So this is what it feels like in {player}'s arms... warm, and even more dependable than it looks.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.hint_continue: Click the dialogue box to continue. Mood affects favor gains; rude or excessive actions directly reduce favor.
ui.maidmarriage.hug_action.hint_idle: Choose an action above. Locked intimacy stays hidden; rude or excessive actions directly reduce favor.
advancements.maidmarriage.stage_warm.des: Your maid is no longer quite so reserved around you.
advancements.maidmarriage.stage_close.de: The bond deepens, and the air between you starts to turn sweet.
advancements.maidmarriage.heart_pact.des: Confirm your feelings with your maid.
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.flower.red: A little red flower from %2$s! %1$s will put it somewhere special~ (>w<)
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.flower.yello: Yellow flowers are like tiny suns. Thank you, %2$s! (=^_^=)
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.flower.blue: Blue flowers feel so quiet. %1$s will keep them safe. (*^_^*)
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.flower.white: A soft white flower! It feels so clean and gentle, %2$s. (owo)
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.flower.orang: Orange flowers are super energetic! %1$s feels powered up! (^o^)/
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.flower.pink: Pink flowers are adorable! %1$s loves %2$s's gift! (>///<)
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.flower.purpl: Purple flowers feel like tiny magic. %1$s will treasure them~ (*`w`*)
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.flower.black: Black flowers are kind of cool... %2$s is great at choosing gifts!
dialogue.maidmarriage.child.flower.rainb: Wow! So many colors! %2$s is the best, %1$s is happy enough to spin~ (?>?<)?
dialogue.maidmarriage.carry_child.start: Ehehe... being carried by mama feels so safe.
dialogue.maidmarriage.carry_child.stop: Am I back on the ground already? I will stand nicely then.
dialogue.maidmarriage.carry_child.infant: %2$s, our child is still tiny on her first day. Let me hold her a little longer.
%2$s, she feels safest in my arms right now. We can let her try standing tomorrow.
%2$s, look how peacefully she is sleeping... let mama hold her today.
%2$s, she was just holding onto my sleeve. Putting her down now would make her uneasy.
%2$s, let her listen to mama's heartbeat on her first day. She will be stronger tomorrow.
message.maidmarriage.carry_child.no_chil: No little maid nearby can be carried right now.
message.maidmarriage.carry_child.need_ow: You can only use this on your own little maid: %s
message.maidmarriage.carry_child.need_ch: %s is not a little maid and cannot be carried like this.
message.maidmarriage.carry_child.no_adul: No adult maid nearby is available to carry a little maid.
message.maidmarriage.carry_child.no_moth: Her mother is not nearby, so she cannot be held right now.
message.maidmarriage.carry_child.adult_b: %s is busy and cannot carry a little maid right now.
message.maidmarriage.carry_child.infant_: %s cannot be put down on her first day. Let her mother hold her for now.
message.maidmarriage.carry_child.stop_su: You let %s return to the ground.
ui.maidmarriage.child_name.title: Name the Child
ui.maidmarriage.child_name.description: This name will be written into the little maid's record. Once confirmed, it cannot be changed here again.
message.maidmarriage.child_name.invalid_: The current target is not a valid mother for naming.
message.maidmarriage.child_name.no_child: She is not holding a little maid that can be named.
message.maidmarriage.child_name.not_fami: You can only name this mother's own child.
message.maidmarriage.child_name.already_: %s already has a name and cannot be named again.
message.maidmarriage.child_name.success: The child now has a name: %s.
dialogue.maidmarriage.child_name.success: %2$s, that is a lovely name. Let us call her that from now on.
tooltip.maidmarriage.pregnancy_settlemen: Test tool: right-click your married maid to perform one real conception settlement and print chance / conceived / twins.
message.maidmarriage.child.growth.juveni: %s has passed infancy. Her mother gently sets her down.
message.maidmarriage.child.growth.child: %s has grown into the child stage and looks more dependable now.
message.maidmarriage.child.growth.adult: %s has grown into an adult and can travel with you like other maids now.
message.maidmarriage.pet_head.too_far: %s is too far away. Head pats require within %s blocks.
message.maidmarriage.pet_head.over_pet_p: %s is getting annoyed by too many head pats today. Favorability -%s.
ui.maidmarriage.gift_screen.title: Give Gift
ui.maidmarriage.gift_screen.no_selection: Choose a gift she can receive first.
ui.maidmarriage.gift_screen.discovery_hi: She will only accept two gifts per day. The exact effect depends on mood and relationship stage, so you will have to figure it out.
ui.maidmarriage.gift.preview.blocked: This item has its own special use and is not handled as a normal gift.
ui.maidmarriage.gift.preview.flower: Flowers help deepen the relationship, especially after you grow closer.
ui.maidmarriage.gift.preview.sweet: Sweets mainly comfort her mood, especially when she feels low.
ui.maidmarriage.gift.preview.meal: Care food is steady and mainly restores mood.
ui.maidmarriage.gift.preview.valuable: Valuable gifts depend more on relationship stage; too early can feel distant.
ui.maidmarriage.gift.preview.generic: Daily gifts are casual and mostly give a small mood response.
ui.maidmarriage.gift.preview.odd: Odd gifts may bother her and can reduce favor.
ui.maidmarriage.gift.preview.offensive: Rude gifts directly reduce favor and mood.
message.maidmarriage.gift.invalid_target: There is no maid here who can receive this gift.
message.maidmarriage.gift.too_far: %s is too far away to receive the gift.
message.maidmarriage.gift.daily_limit: %s has already accepted %s gifts today. Come back tomorrow.
dialogue.maidmarriage.gift.sweet: So sweet... %2$s always knows how to cheer %1$s up.
dialogue.maidmarriage.gift.meal: Is %2$s worried %1$s has not eaten properly? Thank you.
dialogue.maidmarriage.gift.valuable: Something this precious... %1$s will keep it carefully.
dialogue.maidmarriage.gift.odd: Um... is %1$s really supposed to accept this?
dialogue.maidmarriage.child_gift.flower: A flower from %2$s! %1$s will put it somewhere easy to see.
dialogue.maidmarriage.child_gift.sweet: So sweet! Thank you, %2$s. %1$s will be very, very happy today.
dialogue.maidmarriage.child_gift.meal: %2$s brought food for %1$s! I will eat it properly.
dialogue.maidmarriage.child_gift.valuabl: Wow... this is shiny. %1$s will keep it safe and not lose it.
dialogue.maidmarriage.child_gift.generic: Thank you, %2$s! %1$s will remember this gift.
dialogue.maidmarriage.child_gift.odd: This is a little strange... but since %2$s gave it to me, %1$s will accept it.
dialogue.maidmarriage.child_gift.offensi: Um... %2$s, this gift makes %1$s a little sad.
ui.maidmarriage.gift_story.flower: Flowers from %s... I will keep them carefully. When I see them again, I will think of you.
ui.maidmarriage.gift_story.sweet: Sweet... %s, did you know I needed exactly this kind of comfort today?
ui.maidmarriage.gift_story.meal: Is this for me? Thank you, %s. I will eat it properly and not waste your kindness.
ui.maidmarriage.gift_story.valuable: Something this precious... I will keep it safe. %s, you really know how to make someone nervous.
ui.maidmarriage.gift_story.generic: Thank you, %s. Even if it is something simple, being remembered by you makes me happy.
ui.maidmarriage.gift_story.odd: This is... unusual. I will accept it, but %s, maybe something more normal next time?
ui.maidmarriage.gift_story.offensive: ...%s, that is not funny. I will accept it, but I really do not like it.
ui.maidmarriage.gift_story.daily_limit: %s, I have already received plenty of your kindness today. If I take more, I will feel a little shy... give it to me tomorrow, okay?
ui.maidmarriage.child_gift_story.flower: Flowers! Are they from %s? I want to show them to mom too.
ui.maidmarriage.child_gift_story.sweet: So sweet! Thank you, %s. Can I have a tiny bite right now?
ui.maidmarriage.child_gift_story.meal: %s brought me food... I will eat it properly so I can grow up a little faster.
ui.maidmarriage.child_gift_story.valuabl: This looks really important... %s, I will hold it with both hands and not lose it.
ui.maidmarriage.child_gift_story.generic: Thank you, %s! I do not know how to give something back yet, but I will remember it.
ui.maidmarriage.child_gift_story.odd: This is a little strange... but since %s gave it to me, I will keep it.
ui.maidmarriage.child_gift_story.offensi: Um... %s, this gift makes me a little sad. Can the next one be gentler?
ui.maidmarriage.child_gift_story.daily_l: %s, I already got lots of gifts today. If I take more, mom might say I am being greedy... can you give it to me tomorrow?
